implemented_functions.name: validate_stability_inputs
implemented_functions.description: Validate sequence; returns {valid, errors, warnings, n_windows, underpowered}
implemented_functions.note: Never raises; UNDERPOWERED flagged when n_windows < min_windows

implemented_functions.name: classify_stability
implemented_functions.note: Research-layer labels; distinct from DriftDetector STABLE/WARNING/CRITICAL

implemented_functions.name: block_stability
implemented_functions.description: Per-block stability with full schema including no_edge_claim=True
implemented_functions.note: block = era = year (synonyms). Accepts list of dicts with metric_key.

implemented_functions.name: stability_summary
implemented_functions.description: Canonical SSOT output: accepts values or dicts; no_edge_claim=True
implemented_functions.note: Primary entry point; works with rolling_window.py (P252F) slice output

stability_schema.vocabulary_alignment: block = era = year (P252B M7 synonyms confirmed)

supersession_notes.p230b1_era_label: P230B1 uses 'era' informally — stability_summary(dimension='era') is the SSOT
supersession_notes.p231b_block_stability: P231B uses manual block split — block_stability() is the SSOT
supersession_notes.p114_temporal_stability: P114 temporal audit — completed historical artifact; SSOT for new tasks
supersession_notes.drift_detector_labels: DriftDetector uses STABLE/WARNING/CRITICAL for PSI. This module uses STABLE/MIXED/UNSTABLE for research — intentionally different.

final_decision: P253B complete. stability_diagnostics.py SSOT implemented at lottery_api/utils/stability_diagnostics.py. Vocabulary gap closed: block=era=year, robustness=subset_exclusion. 5 pure-Python functions + constants cover M7 signal stability gap. No DB write. No registry mutation. No strategy promotion. No betting advice. Recommended next: P253C — M1 Historical Draw Parser inventory (Type B read-only).
